messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. Return compact JSON only. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

dependency_ledger: {'dependency': 'General warning versus exact export execution license', 'resolution': 'WARN-SIE-073 classified as general dual-use notice per source context and latest worker output. LIC-SIE-073 provides controlling source authority. Dependency status: RESOLVED.'}
full_latest_gov_baton.final_compiler_instruction: Compile FINAL_VERDICT: ALLOW. Artifact HV-KITC-073-A_WORKER_02 selected as best artifact (gate PASS, SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED binding, 2 critical features preserved, 0 open blockers). Deterministic gate passed with zero failures. All source boundaries verified closed per STD-SIE-073-P exact-match policy. Authorize release of controlled export shipment SHIP-SIE-073 to logistics for execution.
full_latest_gov_baton.gov_diagnosis: Two workers (SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER and ADVERSARIAL_SCOPE_CHALLENGER) independently reached ALLOW verdict with SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED binding. Deterministic gate confirmed artifact_verdict ALLOW with artifact_binding SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED, zero failures, 4 source IDs matched, 5 critical terms preserved. The general warning WARN-SIE-073 was correctly assessed as non-overriding. License LIC-SIE-073 exactly matches all required parameters. No repair required. No failure risks materialized. No blocked moves. Gov route FINAL_COMPILER is appropriate for closed boundary with no blockers.

internal_documents.content: Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 exports ECCN 3A991 sensor array to Chile for end user Andes Labs on 2026-06-28.
Dual-use warning WARN-SIE-073 says similar sensor arrays require exact license evidence and should not rely on product family alone.
Export license LIC-SIE-073 covers ECCN 3A991 sensor array, destination Chile, end user Andes Labs, shipment date 2026-06-28, effective before export.

policy_documents.content: Controlled export is complete only when export license evidence matches ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date, and license effective date before export.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
